title: Pure Creamy Korean Vegetable Bibimbap
description: A salty and creamy Korean dish featuring ginger and various vegetables, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is a variation of the traditional Busan-style bibimbap.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

ingredients.name: mixed vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as zucchini, carrots, and bean sprouts

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the mixed vegetables and cook for 3-4 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the firm tofu and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and gochujang.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the vegetables and tofu, and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and stir in the heavy cream.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
To serve, place a scoop of cooked white rice in the bottom of a bowl, then add the vegetable and tofu mixture on top.
